headline: PwC UK launches agentic AI partnership with Leah
summary: PwC UK announced a partnership with legal AI company Leah to launch agentic AI solutions. The partnership focuses on developing AI agents that can perform complex legal tasks autonomously rather than just assisting with research. This represents a move toward more sophisticated AI applications in professional services.
so_what: This signals consulting firms are moving toward more advanced agentic AI capabilities, which could translate to similar autonomous AI solutions for healthcare operations, clinical workflows, and administrative tasks.
original_title: Leah and PwC UK launch agentic AI partnership ,  We speak to their AI heads - Legal IT Insider
